rationale: The citing paper frames itself as extending "expert-service and healthcare" theory, and the cited paper is an expert-service healthcare study (IVF) focused on information asymmetry, signaling/insurance, and provider behavior, so there is plausible conceptual relevance. However, the only match evidence is a bare DOI reference (no in-text citation context), and the topics/methods differ substantially (AI-liability formal model vs IVF MBG empirical study), so substantive use cannot be confirmed from current evidence.
